ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION AND PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER FILED 7/7/17, CASE HAS BEEN CONSOLIDATED UNDER LEAD CASE NO. CGC-16-551098 (GUILHERME BRUNO KFOURI V. CS GLOBAL SF LLC, ET AL.), DESIGNATED COMPLEX, AND SINGLY-ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 305 FOR ALL PURPOSES. CMC PREVIOUSLY SET FOR 11/15/17 AT 10:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 610 IS ORDERED TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. (305/MEW)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOSSANTOS, LEANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT CA GLOBAL SF, LLC SFTS, LLC DBA CITY SIGHTSEEING SAN FRANCISCO MALVAR, KENNETH AYALA DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-11-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-23-2017
